channel.title: Posts on What I read every week
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on What I read every week

item.title: What I read this week - 2023/02/03
item.description: The people say that all energy is only borrowed. One day you have to give it back. — Avatar The Way of Water Generate Images With DALL·E 2 and the OpenAI API OpenAI Cookbook An online video suite for professionals How to contribute to a open source project Interview: What does it take to become a software architect? An advanced guide to writing prompts for Midjourney ( text-to-image ) ChatGPT tutorial: ChatGPT - A guide on how to use OpenAI’s new ChatGPT
